mapper.sql: buo.id, buo.created_time, buo.created_timestamp, buo.created_by, buo.created_id, buo.modified_time, buo.modified_timestamp, buo.modified_by, buo.modified_id, buo.deleted, buo.version, buo.remark, buo.checked, buo.user_id, buo.org_id
mapper.delete: delete from user_org where id in
delete from user_org where user_id in
delete from user_org where org_id in
